name: existing-analysis
description: Issue with existing analysis triggers skill and confirms context
expected_behavior: Announces it is using the /work-on-issue skill
Identifies the correct issue and repo
Confirms context with the user before taking action
future_multi_turn_behavior: Notices there's already an analysis on the issue
Shows the user what the existing analysis says
Asks whether to use it as-is, revise it, or start over
Waits for the user to decide — does not overwrite automatically
